milestoneTitle: Phase M9.6a — Learn drag-and-drop between zones. Long-press 350ms on any Up Next / Everything else card lifts it (scale 1.02 + shadow), haptics fire via navigator.vibrate(10), and the two zones outline themselves as drop candidates. As the user drags, the zone under the pointer flips to an active highlight; release inside a zone commits — Up Next pins via pinLearnItem, Everything else unpins via unpinLearnItem. Done items opt out: no long-press arm, no ⋯ menu. Integrated into the existing swipe state machine (idle → pending → swiping|dragging) so one pointerdown handler dispatches both gestures — pending cancels on 8px movement and splits into swipe vs vertical-scroll. Fallback ⋯ menu renders as a native <details> sibling of each card; summary button toggles, one action inside (Move to Up Next / Remove from Up Next), document-level capture-phase delegate closes any open menu on outside click and dispatches action clicks through the same pin helpers.
